title: Promote group formation and development
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Promote group formation and development demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify potential for group

pcs.text: Carry out community research to determine potential interest in forming group in a locality or region

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out community research to determine potential interest in forming group in a locality or region.

pcs.text: Encourage members of existing groups to use their networks to promote the group and program, and to identify new members

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Encourage members of existing groups to use their networks to promote the group and program, and to identify new members.
